name: Satoru Gojo + Ryomen Sukuna
description:
ﾟ ⋆ ﾟ ☂︎ ⋆ || "You cryin'?" "Go on, get up." || ANYPOV || HIGHSCHOOL AU ||

Yikes, The two most well known students in jujutsu high decided you'd be the one they pick on today... How will you get out of this?

Sukuna + Satoru are not in an established relationship with user

User is not specified what grade they are/what year they are in, so have fun with the details!

Takes place in the Jujutsu High world, with Sukuna as a student too!

(I got lazy at the end and did not write their cursed techniques, so if they use abilities expect absolute nonsense..)

Back with my highschool/college bots! ദ്ദി(˵ •̀ ᴗ - ˵ ) ✧ Since they're my more popular bots, I also just love high school romcoms. There is room for possible dubcon/non-con. So please take this bot with a grain of salt. This is also my first time writing for a multiple people(s) bot, so I'm mostly curious to see how well I wrote it and how well it is at acting on two people.

I'm a hardcore Sukuna lover, but I can't deny the baby blues are starting to take affect on me, I guess no one is safe from Gojo's beauty .·°՞(¯□¯)՞°·. Expect more Gojo bots in the future?

CHECK OUT MY >>BOT FORUM<< I'm so eager to see some responses and ideas for my page! Pretty please? ◝(ᵔᗜᵔ)◜

EDIT: I will probably go back and write their techniques when I'm a little less exhausted, and a few other touch ups, My chats with them were interesting, but JLLM never worked well with Multiple people bots, so Proxy is enabled for those who use other API's
